PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-01-2011 Continued To Dec-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Mary Sommer.

The Petition for Probate of Will was continued to December 6, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for time to investigate assets. The Temporary Letters are extended to that date (order for the same in open court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
